title: alchemilla vulgaris var. glabrata
intro: Alchemilla vulgaris var. glabrata, also known as smooth lady's mantle, is a variety of the lady's mantle plant that is commonly found in Europe and Asia. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can help to soothe and calm irritated skin. The health benefits of smooth lady's mantle include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce menstrual cramps, and support the immune system. Smooth lady's mantle can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in traditional medicine to promote overall health and well-being.
